extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Ticket Management App used to generate and review ServiceNow incidents for the UiPath lesson. The app displays a tag field filled with "Sergey," a quantity field set to "3," and a New tickets table containing newly generated incidents. One incident number, INC0124651, is visually highlighted, indicating the ticket number to copy for later use.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the tag field, enter your name, such as "Sergey."
2. In the How many field, enter the number of sample incidents to create, such as "3."
3. Click on the Generate button to create new tickets.
4. In the New tickets list, locate the newly created incidents.
5. Copy the Incident Number from the highlighted ticket, such as "INC0124651."

layout.rationale: High density (1437 chars) + wide (1.73) or very high text
